name: Pasta W/Red Peppers, Greens, Beans, Garlic & Lemon Zest
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup White beans (soaked in water overnight)
4 cups Swiss chard or escarole (washed well and cut into 1/2-inch strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beans, place them in a saucepan, and cover with 2 cups cold water.
2. Add the bay leaf and 2 cloves of garlic, then bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce the heat and simmer until tender, about 45-60 minutes. Remove from the heat.
4. Bring the vegetable stock to a simmer in a saute pan over moderate heat.
5. Add the pepper strips and simmer for 5-8 minutes, then add the greens, minced garlic cloves, and lemon zest. Stir well until the greens are wilted, about 3-4 minutes.
6. Drain the beans (most of the liquid will have been absorbed) using a slotted spoon and add them to the peppers and greens. Warm through.
7. Season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice to taste.
8. Cook the pasta according to package directions, then drain and toss with the beans and vegetables.
